tool_args.label: MTA Stakeholder Assessment
tool_args.raw_text: The main stakeholders of the MTA are its customers; the businesses, residents, and taxpayers of our service area and the State; the MTA's employees and unions; and its government partners.

payload.claim_text: The main stakeholders of the MTA are its customers; the businesses, residents, and taxpayers of our service area and the State; the MTA's employees and unions; and its government partners.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The main stakeholders of the MTA are its customers; the businesses, residents, and taxpayers of our service area and the State; the MTA's employees and unions; and its government partners.

tool_args.label: Statutory Requirement for Mission Statement Report
tool_args.raw_text: Section 1269-f and Section 2824-a of the Public Authorities Law require MTA to annually reexamine its mission statement, reassess its stakeholders and selected performance measurement indicators, and to submit a report based on the performance indicator results from the previous year.

payload.claim_text: Section 1269-f and Section 2824-a of the Public Authorities Law require MTA to annually reexamine its mission statement, reassess its stakeholders and selected performance measurement indicators, and to submit a report based on the performance indicator results from the previous year.
payload.subject: Metropolitan Transportation Authority
payload.description: Legal requirement for MTA's annual mission statement, stakeholder assessment, and performance indicators report

evidence_refs.source_quote: Section 1269-f and Section 2824-a of the Public Authorities Law require MTA to annually reexamine its mission statement, reassess its stakeholders and selected performance measurement indicators, and to submit a report

tool_args.label: MTA Strategic Priorities and Key Performance Measures Framework
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Strategic Priorities Key Performance Measures Deliver better service Weekday Major Incidents – Subways (monthly average) Customer Journey Time Perf. (% within 5 min of scheduled) – Subways, NYCT & MTA Bus ... Promote safety & respect Customer Injury Rate (per million customers) – Subways ... Increase appeal for customers Elevator Availability – Subways, LIRR, Metro-North ... Provide 21st century bus service Customer Journey Time – NYCT & MTA Bus (% within 5 min of scheduled) ... Achieve financial stability & viability Farebox Operating Ratio – NYCT, LIRR, Metro-North ... Strengthen & expand the network Capital Program project commitments Capital Program project completions Revive talent & culture Female Representatives in Workforce – NYCT, LIRR, Metro-North, Bridges and Tunnels, and Construction & Development Minority Representatives in Workforce – NYCT, LIRR, Metro-North, Bridges and Tunnels, and Construction & Development

payload.claim_text: The MTA's seven strategic priorities for 2024 are: Deliver better service; Promote safety & respect; Increase appeal for customers; Provide 21st century bus service; Achieve financial stability & viability; Strengthen & expand the network; Revive talent & culture. Each priority is associated with specific key performance measures.
payload.subject: Metropolitan Transportation Authority
payload.description: MTA's 2024 strategic priorities and associated key performance indicator framework
